title: The Foreigners Law (Application and Amendment) Act, 1962
full_text: The Foreigners Law (Application and Amendment) Act, 1962 विदेशियों विषयक विधि (लागू होना और संशोधन) अधिनियम, 1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196242 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 1962-11-24 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The Foreigners Law (Application and Amendment) Act, 1962 Hindi Title: विदेशियों विषयक विधि (लागू होना और संशोधन) अधिनियम, 1962 Long Title: An Act to apply the Registration of Foreigners Act, 1939 and the Foreigners Act, 1946 to certain persons to whom they do not at present apply and further to amend the Foreigners Act, 1946. Short title. Section 2. Application of Act 16 of 1939 and Act 31 of 1946 to certain persons. Section 3. Repealed. Section 4. Repeal and saving.
